message:
feat(Python): Implement 8 remaining CPython Python/ modules in Zig

Implements the final batch of Python/ modules:

- frozen.zig (~277 lines) - Frozen module registry for bytecode compiled
  into interpreter, enabling standalone executable distribution
- frozenmain.zig (~289 lines) - Frozen application entry point with
  FrozenConfig, FrozenMainState, and command-line argument parsing
- jit.zig (~372 lines) - JIT compiler infrastructure with tiered compilation,
  hotness tracking via ExecutionCounter, code cache management
- perf_trampoline.zig (~357 lines) - Linux perf profiler integration with
  PerfMapWriter, TrampolineManager, symbol generation
- perf_jit_trampoline.zig (~484 lines) - JIT/perf integration with DWARF
  debug info generation, GDB JIT interface, perf map files
- instruction_sequence.zig (~516 lines) - Bytecode instruction builder with
  labels, jump resolution, stack depth tracking, line number tables
- remote_debugging.zig (~576 lines) - Debug protocol support with breakpoint
  management, session state machine, step modes (into/over/out)
- uniqueid.zig (~459 lines) - Unique ID generation with namespaces, UUID v4
  generation/parsing, code object and heap type ID tracking

All modules include comprehensive tests.
